case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. SHANNON WATTS

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-13-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PAM LOUISE LUU BSA OFFICER. DEFENDANT SHANNON WATTS IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY @2229.05 BEFORE DEC-05-2019. PARTIES MUST APPEAR IN COURT IF COMPLETE PAYMENT IS NOT MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
